description: Representative starting servers for each profile, based on AWS recommended instance families for each workload type. All instances are current-generation Intel x86, sized to match scale tier vCPU minimums. AWS is used as the baseline provider as the leading cloud provider by market share.

web_server.rationale: General purpose family recommended by AWS for web applications and SaaS workloads

compute_heavy.rationale: Compute optimized family recommended by AWS for batch processing and compute-intensive workloads

cache_intensive.rationale: Memory optimized family recommended by AWS for in-memory databases and data stores

ml_inference.rationale: Compute optimized family for CPU-based ML inference workloads (floating point and SIMD intensive)

ci_cd_build.rationale: Compute optimized family for CPU-bound compilation and build workloads
